summary: Iteration 2 — scrubber + mobile responsiveness. Backend 5/5 PASS (regression). Desktop @1920: scrubber visible, current/duration update on play (0:03, 3:24), slider max=204=audio.duration, programmatic seek to 50% drives audio.currentTime to ~102s ✓; volume slider, prev/next, contact submit all still PASS. Mobile @390: mobile-nav pill visible (4 links), left-nav hidden, scrubber hidden, hero-mobile-services visible, music-player visible at bottom with 40px gap above viewport bottom (clears Emergent badge), play button hit-tested OK (elementFromPoint returns inner Lucide polygon — i.e., the button itself), mobile-socials dock visible with all 4 socials, /music shows 6 tracks (tap plays track), /about portrait visible, /gear loads, /contact submit returns success, /services/guitar-recording renders with CTA visible & HOME works on all pages. 100% of requested checks pass.
critical_code_review_comments: MusicPlayer.jsx: onMouseUp/onTouchEnd both set audio.currentTime — good; consider adding onChange-driven commit for keyboard arrow-key seeks (currently keyboard seek only updates UI state, not audio.currentTime, until next mouseup which won't fire from keyboard). Minor a11y gap.

MusicPlayer.jsx line 282: input[type=range] is `disabled={!duration}` — confirmed working since duration loads quickly via preload='auto'; if a track ever fails metadata load, the scrubber will be permanently disabled with no fallback UI/error indicator.

LeftNav.jsx: mobile-socials uses `bottom-[112px]` arbitrary value; player height is ~60px on mobile + 40px gap = 100px, so 112px gives ~12px clearance. Tight but works. Recommend Tailwind named utility for maintainability.
ServicePage HOME button stacking issue from iter_1 is now confirmed FIXED (HOME back nav works on /services/guitar-recording at mobile and verified earlier in iter_1 self-test on desktop).
All track URLs still identical (same Boxhead MP3) — intentional placeholder per problem statement; flag for content team.
seed_data_creation: Contact submissions made during testing (Desktop Test, Test) — auto-stored in MongoDB. The pytest TEST_-prefixed submission is cleaned up by the test; the playwright submissions remain but are clearly demo data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py — 5 tests, all pass. Frontend uses TWO different track-row testids: pages/SectionPage.jsx exposes `music-track-{i}` and `music-track-play-{i}` (NOT `track-row-{i}`). Use viewport 1920x900 for desktop, 390x844 for mobile. Use `wait_until='domcontentloaded'` (Three.js canvas keeps load event busy). Audio analyser may fail to initialize on programmatic test runs because createMediaElementSource needs a real gesture — but the underlying <audio> element still plays and audio.currentTime advances, so seek/duration tests work fine. When validating play-button click-through on mobile via elementFromPoint, Lucide icons render their own <polygon>/<path> child — elementFromPoint will return that inner SVG element, which is still the visible button. Treat any svg/polygon/path child of the player-play-button as a PASS.
